panels.description: Wide shot: The narrator ('I') moves through dense, tropical jungle foliage on a steep incline. Sunlight filters weakly through the canopy. The environment suggests a remote, humid island setting. The narrator is small, emphasizing the isolation and the 'foliage and grinding of boughs' mentioned in the text.

bubbles.text: This was my second folly, far worse than the first... but like the first, it was a help towards saving all of us.

panels.description: Wide establishing shot: The jungle opens abruptly onto a bright, sunny beach. Large, powerful ocean waves crash dramatically onto the shore (the 'surf tumbling and tossing its foam'). The deep blue sea stretches to the horizon, conveying immense, constant energy.

Medium shot: The narrator ('I') carefully creeps along the edge of the thick bushes, looking cautiously towards the anchorage area. The foreground shows dense green undergrowth, contrasting with the calm, still water visible in the background beyond the ridge. A slight, eerie fog begins to creep in near the water.

Long shot/Medium Wide: The still, reflective water of the anchorage dominates the lower half. In the distance, the 'HISPANIOLA' is clearly visible with the black 'Jolly Roger' flying high. Zoomed in slightly on the gig alongside, showing Silver in the stern and two figures leaning over the rail, one clearly wearing a red cap. Peaceful but tense atmosphere.
characters: the man with the red cap

panels.description: Medium close-up on the distant figures near the ship's rail (the man with the red cap and his comrade). They are engaged in conversation, possibly laughing, but their expressions are obscured by distance. Heavy use of shadow across the boat to signify distance and secrecy.
characters: the man with the red cap

panels.description: Close-up on the narrator's face ('I'). Extreme horror and shock. Eyes wide, mouth slightly agape, sweat beading on the brow. Heavy, dark shadowing across the face emphasizing the 'horrid, unearthly screaming'. Above the narrator's head, a small inset bubble might show a flash of Captain Flint's bird.

Medium shot: Looking down into a small, hidden dell covered in thick undergrowth. The jolly-boat is pulling away from the viewer towards the shore. In the dell, a small, crudely constructed tent of goat-skins is visible, illuminated by a single shaft of dim light cutting through the growing darkness.
